title: Gooey Resinous Tunisian Meal-Prep Pizza
description: A flavorful and aromatic vegetarian pizza dish inspired by Tunisian cuisine, featuring red onions and a gooey resinous sauce.
instructions: Roll out the pizza dough to a thickness of 1/4 inch and transfer it to a baking sheet or pizza stone.
Spread the resinous sauce over the dough, leaving a 1/2 inch border around the edges.
Top the sauce with the sliced red onion and sprinkle with olive oil.
Bake the pizza in the preheated oven for 20 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown and the sauce is bubbly.
Remove the pizza from the oven and let it cool for 5 minutes before slicing and serving.
Cut the pizza into 6-8 slices and transfer them to an airtight container or zip-top bag for meal prep.
Label the container with the date and contents, and refrigerate for up to 3 days or freeze for up to 2 months.
To reheat, place the slices in the oven at 350°F (180°C) for 10-15 minutes, or until crispy and hot.
Serve warm, garnished with chopped fresh parsley or cilantro if desired.
